HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

36class SingSub {
37 private:
38 // --- Cached state (from RWG/triangle and observation point) ---

40 rvec r;
41 std::vector<rvec> edgeNormals;
42 std::vector<double> t;
43 double h;
44 double omega;
45
46 // --- Precomputed arrays for "better" initialization path ---
47 Triangle* tPtr;
48 rvec eNar[3];
49 double tar[3];
50 double ILar[3][3];
51 double ISar[4];
52
53 public:
55 SingSub();
56
